---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Sourdex doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. How would it work?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Scope / fit

How does this fit Sourdex's local-first, privacy-by-default direction
(see [docs/PRD.md](../../docs/PRD.md) and [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md))?
